docs.title: Production DBA Playbook
docs.text:
Welcome to our centralized repository for production database activities.

Use the navigation tabs above to find verified scripts and step-by-step procedures.

docs.title: Oracle RAC Cluster Operations
docs.text: This page contains standard operating procedures for managing our 2-node Oracle RAC environments.

docs.title: 1. Check Clusterware Status
docs.text:
Run this from the grid user to check the health of the cluster infrastructure across all nodes.

```bash crsctl check cluster -all

Check Instance and Database Status

```bash

SELECT inst_id, instance_name, host_name, status, database_status FROM gv$instance;
